features.name: static NBA with event wait in task
features.description: Code should include a task with static local variables where a non-blocking assignment to the static variable is followed by an event control wait on that variable
features.snippet: task wait_nba; static int nba; nba <= 1; @(nba); endtask

features.name: parallel task calls with shared static state
features.description: Code should include fork-join_none with multiple concurrent calls to the same task that uses static variables for synchronization

features.name: static int with non-blocking increment and caller tracking
features.description: Code should include a task using static int variables with non-blocking increment (next_nba++) followed by NBA assignment and automatic local variable for call tracking
features.snippet: static int nba; static int next_nba; automatic int caller; next_nba++; caller = next_nba; nba <= next_nba;
